title: "Future Phase: Implement First Analytical Vertical Slice and Evidence-Based Summary"
labels: future
---

## Objective

Build the first end-to-end analytical slice that turns validated data into evidence-backed conclusions.

## Scope

- Deterministic analytics
- Signal generation
- Evidence packaging
- Report draft assembly

## Tasks

- [ ] Add one complete module from data to signal
- [ ] Track supporting and contradicting evidence
- [ ] Define the first report shape
- [ ] Add tests for the analytical slice

## Acceptance Criteria

- A module can produce a transparent signal.
- The report can show evidence and counter-evidence.
- Tests prove the logic is deterministic.

## Out of Scope

- Trade execution
- Authentication
- Deployment automation
